session.assistant:
Perfect! All the requested replacements have been successfully completed. Let me provide a summary:
## Summary
I've successfully updated all test assertion strings in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py` to change "plan" terminology to "PR" terminology. The following replacements were made:
1. ✅ `"Found 2 plan(s)"` → `"Found 2 PR(s)"` (line 414) 2. ✅ `"No plans found"` → `"No PRs found"` (line 437) 3. ✅ `"Closed plan #42"` → `"Closed PR #42"` (lines 147, 167) 4. ✅ `"Plan #999 not found"` → `"PR #999 not found"` (lines 119, 183, 273, 527) 5. ✅ `"1 plan(s) dispatched successfully"` → `"1 PR(s) dispatched successfully"` (line 499) 6. ✅ `"2 plan(s) dispatched successfully"` → `"2 PR(s) dispatched successfully"` (line 595) 7. ✅ `"Plan number(s) required in remote mode"` → `"PR number(s) required in remote mode"` (line 577)
All changes were made using `replace_all=true` to ensure consistency throughout the file. Test docstrings, variable names, and non-assertion strings (like comments mentioning "plan-header metadata") were preserved as requested.
